scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run typecheck
scripts.dev: npm run build:client && wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2026-06-14 --d1 DB=business-card-db --r2 CARD_IMAGES=business-card-images
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public
